---
title: "Which is Real?"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false
    html-table-processing: none
    theme:
      dark: darkly
      light: cosmo
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.27.0.min.js"></script>
          <style>
          body{font-size:1.3em}
          caption,figcaption,.figure-caption{color:#fff!important}
          #quiz-app{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px}
          .quiz-intro h2{color:#6c9bd2;margin-bottom:.5em}
          .quiz-intro ul{font-size:1.05em;line-height:1.8}
          .option-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:12px 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
          .option-label{font-weight:bold;min-width:100px;color:#aaa}
          .option-btn-group{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
          .option-btn{padding:10px 20px;border:2px solid #555;border-radius:8px;background:#2b3e50;color:#ddd;cursor:pointer;font-size:1em}
          .option-btn:hover{border-color:#4a90d9}
          .option-btn.selected{border-color:#4a90d9;background:#14549e;color:#fff}
          .btn-start{display:inline-block;padding:14px 40px;font-size:1.2em;font-weight:bold;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;margin-top:1.5em;background:#4a90d9;color:#fff}
          .btn-start:hover{background:#3a7bc8}
          .quiz-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:.5em;gap:8px}
          .quiz-nav-left,.quiz-nav-right{flex:0 0 auto;}
          .quiz-center-info{flex:1;text-align:center;color:#ddd;font-size:1em;}
          .quiz-score-inline{color:#6c9bd2;margin-left:12px;}
          .quiz-difficulty{display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;font-size:.85em;font-weight:bold}
          .quiz-difficulty.easy{background:#1a9850;color:#fff}
          .quiz-difficulty.medium{background:#e6a817;color:#000}
          .quiz-difficulty.hard{background:#d73027;color:#fff}
          .quiz-difficulty.pseudo{background:#7b3294;color:#fff}
          .quiz-row{display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:16px;margin:12px 0}
          .quiz-col{flex:1;min-width:0}
          .quiz-vs{flex:0 0 50px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3em;font-weight:bold;color:#666}
          .quiz-btn{width:100%;min-height:320px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-start;border:2px solid #555;border-radius:8px;background:#1a1a2e;color:#ddd;cursor:pointer;padding:8px}
          .quiz-btn:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:#4a90d9}
          .quiz-btn:disabled{cursor:default;opacity:.85}
          .quiz-btn-correct{border-color:#1a9850!important;background:#0d2818!important}
          .quiz-btn-wrong{border-color:#d73027!important;background:#2d0f0f!important}
          .quiz-btn .series-label{font-size:1.1em;font-weight:bold;margin:4px 0}
          .quiz-btn .chart-container{width:100%;flex:1;min-height:250px}
          .quiz-controls{text-align:center;margin:12px 0}
          .quiz-nav-btn{padding:10px 24px;margin:4px;font-size:1em;border:2px solid #555;border-radius:8px;background:#222;color:#ddd;cursor:pointer}
          .quiz-nav-btn:hover{border-color:#4a90d9;color:#fff}
          .quiz-nav-btn.primary{background:#4a90d9;border-color:#4a90d9;color:#fff}
          .explanation-panel{background:#111;border:1px solid #444;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;margin:12px 0;display:none}
          .explanation-panel.show{display:block}
          .length-selector{margin:8px 0}
          .length-selector label{color:#aaa;margin-right:8px}
          .length-selector select{background:#222;color:#ddd;border:1px solid #555;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:4px}
          .results-cards{display:flex;gap:16px;margin:16px 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
          .result-card{flex:1;min-width:200px;padding:20px;border-radius:8px;text-align:center}
          .result-card.score{background:#14549e;color:#fff}
          .result-card.baseline{background:#333;color:#ddd}
          .result-card .big-num{font-size:2.5em;font-weight:bold}
          .result-card .label{font-size:.9em;opacity:.8}
          @media(max-width:600px){.quiz-row{flex-direction:column}.quiz-vs{flex:0 0 30px}.quiz-btn{min-height:250px}}
          </style>
          <script>
          if(!localStorage.getItem('quarto-color-scheme'))document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme','dark');
          </script>
    include-after-body:
      - file: quiz-app.html
      - file: quiz-logic.js
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(targets)
store_path <- if (dir.exists("_targets")) "_targets" else
  file.path(here::here(), "docs/_targets")
tar_config_set(store = store_path)
utils_path <- if (file.exists("vignette_utils.R")) "vignette_utils.R" else
  file.path(here::here(), "docs/vignette_utils.R")
source(utils_path)
```

```{r}
#| label: quiz-data
#| results: asis
quiz_json <- safe_tar_read("quiz_json")
if (!is.null(quiz_json)) {
  cat(paste0('<script id="quiz-data-json" type="application/json">\n', quiz_json, '\n</script>'))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: build-info
#| results: asis
build_info()
```
